evals.prompt: Convert my logo.svg to Chrome extension icons
evals.expected_output: Generate icon16.png, icon32.png, icon48.png, icon128.png in the project root directory

evals.prompt: I need browser extension icons from my icon.svg file for manifest.json
evals.expected_output: Convert SVG to four PNG sizes and save as icon16.png, icon32.png, icon48.png, icon128.png

evals.prompt: Turn this reading.svg into Chrome extension icon files
evals.expected_output: Generate all four standard Chrome extension icon PNGs with correct naming
